changes.value:
src/privacy.rs:174-175, 198-210, 263-273, 361-368, 409-432

Coverage: 60.5% (75/124 lines)

Uncovered lines:
- 174-175: PrivacyHeaders::apply_privacy_headers (identity function)
- 198-210: RequestJitter::apply_jitter (async, needs tokio test)
- 263-273: InstanceDistributor::record_instance_use
- 361-368: AdaptiveRateLimiter::apply_adaptive_delay (async)
- 409-432: PrivacyManager delegation methods (apply_privacy_headers, apply_jitter, select_distributed_instance, record_instance_use, record_captcha_challenge)

Most impactful: record_instance_use needs a test verifying it caps the deque at avoid_repeat_count. PrivacyManager delegation methods can be tested via integration-style tests.
Add tests for PrivacyManager delegation and InstanceDistributor record_instance_use
